summary: Clean soundboard mix captures a fiery Boston ’91 run with standout China > Rider, Dark Star and Desolation Row performances
review: The recording is a well‑remastered soundboard source with a very clean mix that some listeners note needs a volume boost. The show itself is praised as one of the best of the 1991 Boston stretch – an explosive first set and a second set full of energy, highlighted by China > Rider, a hot Dark Star, Foolish Out Of Space and a soaring Desolation Row.

ai_rating.rationale: Most reviewers give 4‑5 stars and describe the performance as exceptional; recording comments are uniformly positive aside from occasional volume‑level notes, yielding a strong overall rating.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Very clean mix and good remaster; some listeners mention the need for a higher playback volume but no major distortion or drop‑outs reported.

show_quality.setlist_flow: First set described as strong and fire‑filled; second set equally sizzling with high energy throughout the Boston run.

band_member_comments.Jerry: Jerry’s guitar work is highlighted – his “crazy midi‑fied solos” almost melted listeners’ heads and his stage look over the glasses was noted.
band_member_comments.Keys: Brent (referred to as Bruce) is said to be all over the keyboards, contributing heavily to the texture of the show.
